headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma revises long-term strategy with focus on digital payments

sentiment.reasoning: A pivot from biopharma to digital payments represents a radical and highly uncertain strategic shift that likely confuses investors.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
